title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0265
summary: 1 Respondent, a retail druggist in Columbus, Georgia, was charged in two counts of an information with a violation of § 301(k) of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act of 1938. That section prohibits 'the doing of any * * * act with respect to, a * * * drug * * * if such act is done while such...
